item.title: Ford Mustang GTD Laps the NÃ¼rburgring, Targets Production-Car Record
item.description: Ford has confirmed the Mustang GTD is undertaking an official NÃ¼rburgring lap programme, with the goal of setting a production-car record. Early sector times reported by trackside observers suggest the supercharged V8 muscle car is genuinely quick.

item.title: 2025 Porsche 911 GT3 RS Review: Precision Engineered for the Track
item.description: Some cars are fast. The 2025 Porsche 911 GT3 RS is precise in a way that makes “fast” feel like an afterthought.
